title: pelargonium × melancholicum
intro: Pelargonium × melancholicum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Barberton Daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from the essential oils contained within its leaves. The health benefits of Pelargonium × melancholicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, are commonly used to harness these benefits and promote overall well-being.
